revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-945

The locus of points at which direct rays from the antenna become tangential to the earth's surface, taking into account the curvature due to refraction.

Reference: C.C.I.R.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Radio horizon}}
